evals.prompt: Rename database table 'old_products' to 'products', copy all data, update all code references, then delete old table
evals.expected_output: products table with data, no code references old_products, old table deleted

evals.prompt: Find and fix column name mismatch: query returns 'total_amount' but code expects 'total'
evals.expected_output: Code correctly accesses data using dict(row) keys that match SQL aliases

evals.prompt: Rename function 'calculateTotal' to 'calculate_total' across all Python files
evals.expected_output: All calls updated to new function name, no orphaned references

evals.prompt: Clean up duplicate tables: 'user_data' and 'users' both exist with similar data. Analyze which to keep, migrate data, update references, delete obsolete table
evals.expected_output: Single users table, all code updated, no data loss

evals.prompt: After renaming column 'qty' to 'quantity', fix all Python code that accessed old column name
evals.expected_output: All code references updated, queries return correct data

evals.prompt: Add new calculated field 'profit = revenue - cost' to existing sales table. Calculate for all rows, verify values make sense
evals.expected_output: profit field calculated correctly, values positive when revenue > cost
